backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining data types (Journey, LocationInfo, UserProfile, CityRating, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, WebsiteLayoutSettings, ScheduleItem, MapBookmark, VibeItem, GeonameCity) and managing state with OrderedMaps for country coordinates, location info, journeys, user profiles, city ratings, albums, travel spots, music albums, layout settings, schedules, bookmarks, geoname cities, and timezone GeoJSON, plus registry and access control initialization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature to modify WebsiteLayoutPanel component to append UTC offset (e.g., '(UTC +8)') to local time display at a specific XPath.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend files including App.tsx, CountryMapExplorer, MapComponent with journey filtering and schedule markers, query hooks, styling, LocationMapExplorer, dialogs, AdminPanel with calendar date-range selection, rating components, album managers, file storage, authentication, and media galleries.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Country Map Explorer app, loading SunCalc library and mounting the React app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up QueryClient, ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, BackendDebugger, LocationMapExplorer, and Toaster for the application.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin control panel component managing journeys with calendar date-range selection and time inputs, schedule items, travel spots, music albums, geoname data, and timezone management with collapsible sections and CRUD operations.
Development utility component that exposes the backend actor to window.backend for console debugging, displays principal/role information, and provides instructions for admin queries and emergency admin promotion.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: City album manager component with file upload (images/videos including WebP, AVIF, MOV), real-time social media URL validation for YouTube/Instagram links, media gallery display, and CRUD operations requiring authentication.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: React component for managing geoname cities with import from TSV files, CRUD operations, pagination, search, and automatic classification based on feature codes.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: Interactive heart-based rating component (0-10 scale) supporting partial fills, hover states, and click-to-rate functionality with configurable sizes and readonly mode.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: 3D globe visualization using Three.js with timezone overlays, city markers, country borders, day/night terminator, flight animations, and interactive camera controls.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders journey itineraries in a playful scrapbook/polaroid style with colorful gradients, rotated elements, and Comic Sans font for a casual, creative aesthetic.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: React component that renders a vintage postcard-styled itinerary dialog with retro design elements (stamps, ribbons, postmarks) displaying journey schedule grouped by days with activities and times.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: Dialog component for adding/editing/deleting location photos with file upload, preview, validation, and blob storage integration.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: Authentication panel using Internet Identity with login/logout functionality, status display, and principal ID visualization.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: Leaflet-based map component displaying travel spots, bookmarks, and schedule items with custom icons, popups, filtering by city, and route visualization.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media content (YouTube, Instagram) with navigation controls and fullscreen support.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: Admin interface for managing music albums and songs, including CRUD operations, file uploads, search/filter functionality, and integration with backend queries and blob storage.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog component that displays all music albums and songs from the collection, allowing users to browse and select songs for playback with album grouping.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar with playback controls (play/pause, skip, volume), progress tracking, and auto-play support that manages audio playback across the application.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: Admin component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, with validation, IndexedDB caching, backend persistence, and manual execution workflow with step-by-step verification.
Displays journeys organized by status (live/upcoming/past) with collapsible itineraries, schedule editing, and flight animations. Supports both doodle and retro itinerary view styles.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: Manages travel spots with CRUD operations, file uploads, social media links, and heart ratings. Includes a dialog form for creating/editing spots with city filtering, media preview, and type categorization.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: Shows bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city and type with expandable sections. Provides icons and colors for different spot types and supports focusing on items on the map.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: Settings panel for website layout preferences including music player toggle, default search location, and local time display with UTC offset calculation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations including location geocoding, journey management, media uploads, travel spots, social media links, music albums, and website settings with validation utilities for URLs and country names.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including color schemes for UI components, music player styling, and specific heading color rules for different background modes.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides solar declination angle calculation for a given day of year using Earth's axial tilt formula, with test cases for equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Utility to find timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset with quarter-hour precision, using Intl API for DST-aware calculations and filtering out 'Etc/' zones.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Manages timezone boundary data loading from backend or IndexedDB cache, validates GeoJSON structure, and provides point-in-polygon detection for timezone lookup.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Timezone boundary rendering library for 3D globe visualization using Three.js, handling coordinate conversion, polygon unwrapping across antimeridian, and quarter-hour precision timezone offset calculations with optional translucent fill rendering.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main page component managing location search, map/globe view modes, travel spots, bookmarks, music player, timezone display, and various UI panels with state for flight animations and city selections.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and labeling utilities for schedule days (D1, D2, etc.), computing day indices from timestamps and formatting day context strings.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups and sorts schedule items by calendar day and chronological time, building per-day route coordinates for multi-day itineraries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup functions for sensitive parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, sidebar/chart/card color tokens, custom border radius variables, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking a web application with 3D globe visualization and timezone-aware map settings, including one implemented feature that adds UTC offset display to local time in the WebsiteLayoutPanel component.
